scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev -w apps/server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/server && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.start: concurrently -n web,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run start -w apps/web" "npm run start -w apps/server"
